servers.name: FreeDesignStore Catalog
servers.description: Tools for reading and populating the FreeDesignStore community visual asset catalog. Supports FDS-hosted/community photos, generated SVG illustrations, icons, patterns, textures, and moderation. Unsplash assets are linked with attribution and are not mirrored into FDS.

tools.name: asset_policy
tools.description: Read catalog hosting rules, including Unsplash link-off policy

tools.name: list_design_skills
tools.description: List published FDS design asset playbooks

tools.name: get_design_skill
tools.description: Get one published FDS design asset playbook

tools.name: apply_design_skill
tools.description: Apply a design asset playbook as questions, a checklist, or a tool plan

tools.name: catalog_status
tools.description: Check storage readiness and asset counts

tools.name: list_assets
tools.description: List public or admin-visible pending catalog assets

tools.name: my_assets
tools.description: List assets owned by the authenticated creator account

tools.name: get_asset
tools.description: Get one asset's metadata and download URL

tools.name: create_svg_asset
tools.description: Create a hosted generated SVG asset under the authenticated account

tools.name: create_asset_from_url
tools.description: Ingest a public non-Unsplash HTTPS image URL under the authenticated account

tools.name: moderate_asset
tools.description: Publish or reject a pending asset

tools.name: unpublish_asset
tools.description: Move a public owned asset back to pending before deletion

tools.name: delete_asset
tools.description: Delete catalog metadata and the R2 object
